steps.title: Measure RNA concentration and purity using a Nanodrop spectrophotometer
steps.instruction: Measure RNA concentration and purity using a Nanodrop spectrophotometer.

steps.title: Extract total RNA using the NucleoSpin...
steps.instruction: Extract total RNA using the NucleoSpin RNA Plus Kit according to the manufacturer's protocol.

steps.title: Reverse transcribe 1 μg of RNA...
steps.instruction: Reverse transcribe 1 μg of RNA into cDNA using the High-Capacity cDNA Reverse Transcription Kit, following the manufacturer's instructions.

steps.title: Prepare the qPCR reaction mix (per well)
steps.instruction: Prepare the qPCR reaction mix (per well): 10 μl SYBR Green qPCR Master Mix 1 μl forward primer (5 μM) 1 μl reverse primer (5 μM) 5 μl cDNA template (diluted 1:10 in nuclease-free water) 3 μl nuclease-free water

steps.title: Prepare reactions in duplicate for each target and reference gene
steps.instruction: Prepare reactions in duplicate for each target and reference gene.

steps.title: Perform amplification using a Light Cycler...
steps.instruction: Perform amplification using a Light Cycler with the following thermal cycling conditions: Initial denaturation: 95 °C for 10 min 50 cycles: 95 °C for 10 s, 55 °C for 30 s, 95 °C for 1 min, 55 °C for 1 min

steps.title: Include a melting curve analysis from...
steps.instruction: Include a melting curve analysis from 55 °C to 95 °C.

steps.title: Record the mean Cq values for all reactions
steps.instruction: Record the mean Cq values for all reactions.

steps.title: Normalize target gene expression (Atp13a4) to...
steps.instruction: Normalize target gene expression (Atp13a4) to the reference gene (Gapdh) using the ΔΔCq method.
